name: Micro Loans NW
description_short: Micro Loans NW is a Kent, Washington-based financial services provider offering payday loans, business loans, check cashing, and wire transfers since 2010.
description_long:
Micro Loans NW was founded in 2010 and operates as a community-based financial services provider in Kent, Washington. The company positions itself as a neighborhood lender focused on serving customers who need quick access to cash and financial services. With over a decade of operation, they have built their business around serving local customers during financial emergencies and for routine cash-handling needs.

The company offers a diverse array of financial products including payday loans, business loans, check cashing, money orders, bill payment services, and Western Union wire transfers. Their service hours extend until 8:00 pm on weekdays, with Western Union wire transfer services available Monday through Thursday from 12 pm to 7 pm. They emphasize in-person service delivery and encourage customers to visit their single location at 118 Central Avenue South in Kent.

Micro Loans NW distinguishes itself through direct personal interaction and community focus. The company highlights that its team has over 40 years of combined experience and emphasizes treating customers and employees with honesty and respect. Their extended evening hours (until 8:00 pm) and weekend availability accommodate working customers who cannot visit during traditional business hours.

The company operates in a heavily regulated industry but the website provides limited disclosure of rates, terms, or regulatory compliance details. As a payday and short-term lender, customers should be aware that payday loans typically carry high APRs and short repayment terms. The company's emphasis on multiple loan products suggests it serves customers with varying financial needs, though specific eligibility criteria and loan terms are not detailed on their public website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended business hours until 8:00 pm daily, accommodating working customers
In-person service available at physical location in Kent, Washington
Diverse service offerings including payday loans, business loans, check cashing, and wire transfers
Team has over 40 years of combined experience in lending and financial services
Multiple payment options including Western Union wire transfers
Founded in 2010 with decade-plus operating history
Weekend hours available (10 am - 8 pm) for customer convenience
cons: Payday loans typically carry high APR rates not disclosed on website
Limited online information about specific loan terms, rates, or eligibility requirements
Single physical location limits accessibility for non-local customers
Western Union service unavailable Fridays and Saturdays despite overall weekend hours
No online application or loan processing option mentioned
best_for: Customers needing immediate check cashing or wire transfer services in the Kent area
Small business owners seeking quick access to business loans
Workers unable to visit financial institutions during standard business hours due to employment schedules
diagnosis: Micro Loans NW is best suited for Kent-area residents who need quick access to cash services, check cashing, or emergency loans and prefer in-person service with extended evening hours. Primary caveat: payday loans carry high interest rates and short repayment terms; customers should carefully review all terms before borrowing and consider alternative options for longer-term financial needs.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
